currentLinkedIn.headline: Senior Frontend Engineer at Luma Health | React · Accessibility · Performance
currentLinkedIn.about: I build interfaces that are fast, accessible, and maintainable. Seven years of React, with a deep focus on WCAG compliance and Core Web Vitals.

experience.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
bullets: Reduced Largest Contentful Paint from 4.2s to 1.1s on the patient portal used by 800K monthly users
Designed and documented a shared component library (42 components) adopted by five product teams
Led WCAG AA remediation initiative; achieved zero critical accessibility violations in Axe audits

experience.title: Frontend Engineer
bullets: Built interactive map visualization layer using D3 and React; handled 100K+ simultaneous data points
Mentored two junior engineers through code reviews and weekly pair-programming sessions
